name: Bot command rename: drop /ai, /aimulti → /add, category line emoji+label
description: Remove the /ai single-expense command. Rename /aimulti to /add — the merged command handles 1 or many expenses via the existing preview-confirm flow. Fix compact summary lines (renderExpenseSummaryLine) to show emoji + Vietnamese category label + title + amount + date instead of emoji-only. Ensure notification renderers already show emoji+label (verified, no change needed). Update all user-facing bot copy, documentation, harness records, and tests.

planned: Task specification: remove /ai, rename /aimulti → /add, audit category display.
done: service.ts: removed runAiExpenseCommand import and /ai command block; changed /aimulti → /add; now imports runAddExpenseCommand.
ai-expense-service.ts: removed runAiExpenseCommand function and handleAiExpenseCommand import; renamed runAiMultiExpenseCommand → runAddExpenseCommand; updated JSDoc.

ai-expense.ts: removed handleAiExpenseCommand function entirely; renamed handleAiMultiExpenseCommand → handleAddExpenseCommand; removed /ai single-path and extraNote; updated all JSDoc and examples /aimulti → /add.
confirm-expense.ts: updated /ai → /add in all user-facing error/retry strings.
callback-dispatcher.ts: updated /ai → /add in add_expense callback copy.
renderers.ts: renderExpenseSummaryLine now includes getCategoryLabel — output: emoji + label · title · amount₫ · dd/MM.
notifications.ts: verified renderHouseholdActivityText and renderWeeklyDigestText already show emoji + label; budget alert is category-agnostic. No change needed.
telegram-bot-companion.md: updated Command Set (removed /ai, renamed /aimulti → /add), updated all acceptance criteria, flow descriptions, natural-input section, multi-expense section, MVP list.
finance-text.spec.ts: updated renderExpenseSummaryLine test assertion to include category label.
ai-expense-shared.spec.ts: updated mock context text and test rawText from /aimulti → /add.
feat-119.json: updated name, description, notes to reflect rename.
verification: pnpm --filter worker exec vitest run test/unit/bot/renderers/finance-text.spec.ts test/unit/bot/commands/ai-expense-shared.spec.ts test/unit/bot/commands/natural-expense.spec.ts test/unit/bot/notifications/renderers.spec.ts -> 4 files, 44 tests passed.
pnpm --filter worker exec vitest run -> 99 files, 625 tests passed (no regressions).

notes: Category label was already present in household activity and weekly digest notifications — no change needed there. The compact summary line (used in confirm/household-select success and natural-input post-create messages) was the only spot missing the label.
